title: Platform-spec cutover
description:
Closed **2026-05-06** on superrepo [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) (v0.2 delivery tip).

Retired legacy Starlight guide trees; **`/platform-spec/`** is the sole normative documentation area on beskid-lang.org (alongside the Book). Stabilized website container builds with monorepo lockfile and trudoc package bootstrap.

Workstreams: `platform-spec`, `analysis-pipeline`, `docs-site`, `ci-release`. **8** catalog tasks anchor this deliverable (`milestoneId: v02-platform-spec-cutover`).

## Provenance

- [`dfe8ace`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/dfe8ace) (`compiler`) — feat(compiler): add member item resolution and docs pipeline updates
- [`98aa6bc`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/98aa6bc) (`compiler`) — Test harness, formatter, CLI/LSP integration, and CI hardening.
- [`6c5f200`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6c5f200) (`beskid`) — fix(docs-ui): platform-spec home UX — tabs, map height, zoom, typography
- [`e16f55a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/e16f55a) (`compiler`) — Improve ast_reflect_gen Mod SDK syntax emission and bump corelib.
- [`19745d4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/19745d4) (`beskid`) — consolidate platform-spec cutover and stabilize website container build
- [`8aa2813`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8aa2813) (`beskid`) — feat(docs+ci): add trudoc/docs UI packages and workflow updates
- [`2cd54c5`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/2cd54c5) (`compiler`) — Compiler: array type lowering, services split, pipeline crate, rustdoc sweep, Mod SDK regen.
